== Notes for [[Item:Q106014|Q106014]] ==

* Wilaadat (Birth):
* Wafaat (Death):

Source:

ID: I180896

Name: Fatima bint al-Husayn 1

Sex: F

Birth: ABT 710 1

Marriage 1 Abu Abd Allah , Ja'far Shia Imam al-Husayn b: ABT 708

Children

Abd Allah ibn Ja'far al-Husayn b: ABT 730

Umm Farwa bint Ja'far al-Husayn b: ABT 733

Isma'il ibn Ja'far al-Husayn b: 736

Sources:

Title: loren.ged

Repository:

Media: Other

Text: Date of Import: Apr 12, 2006

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
geni:6000000018899893078

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
